meta.title: Buy a Home in Miami & South Florida | Ingrid Ascanio
meta.description: Buying in Miami, Hollywood or anywhere in Florida? One 15-minute call with broker Ingrid Ascanio: a clear budget, fast pre-approval, 50+ lenders shopped.

hero.title: Know your real budget before you fall in love with a house.
hero.body: The buyers who win in South Florida are the ones whose financing is proven before the right listing appears. One short call with Ingrid gets you there — no documents needed, no obligation.

points.title: What you get from the first call

items.name: A number you can trust
items.desc: What you can comfortably afford — verified thinking, not an online estimate. So you shop with confidence, not anxiety.

items.name: A letter that wins offers
items.desc: Pre-approval in 24–48 hours once documents are in — refreshed same-day for every offer you write, weekends included.

items.name: Guidance in plain language
items.desc: First home or fifth, English or Español — every step explained before you're asked to decide anything.

firstTime.title: Never done this before? Even better.
firstTime.body: First-time buyers are some of Ingrid's favorite clients. Low-down-payment programs exist to get you in the door — your exact number depends on your file, and she'll tell you honestly whether now is your moment or what gets you there.

points.small: for the first call — no obligation

cta.title: The first conversation costs nothing — and changes everything after it.
cta.body: 15 minutes. No documents, no commitment. Just clarity on what you can do and how to do it.
